name: Nikto|| Omegaverse
description:
𝐎𝐦𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐞

You are hired by Nikto to help him with his first rut after being tortured by Zakhaev.

User is assumed to be an omega.
If you use LLM I do not recommend using this bot due to how token heavy he is.

Massive thank you to Spider for sharing their omegaverse lore for the creation of the lorebook. They are awesome and I highly recommend all of his bots!
creator: BobaRaccoon
